decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 touched preferences but did not restructure for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 48/2932 lines reworked (1.6%, 31/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 0.9% (15/20).

contextRecovery.justification: All 5 later sessions recovered context effectively (avg: 71).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 234/234 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
